name: Unguided visual exposure, 2 h/day x 4 days, P25-P28
description: Starting at P25, ferret kits are placed in a rat cage on a heating pad in the lab for 2 h per day over 4 consecutive days. Kits are gently manipulated to prevent sleep. No guided stimuli; exposure is to the ambient laboratory environment. This standardises the amount of patterned visual experience (for animals with prematurely opened eyes) or low-resolution lid-filtered experience (for control animals with lids still closed).
